results.title: E2B JavaScript SDK
results.description: The E2B JavaScript SDK allows developers to interact with E2B sandboxes, run commands, manage files, and connect to running processes within the sandbox environment.

results.title: E2B Cookbook
results.description: Example code and guides for building with the E2B SDK, showcasing various LLM providers and use cases like data analysis and code interpretation.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure for running AI-generated code in secure, isolated cloud sandboxes, controllable via JavaScript or Python SDKs.

results.title: E2B Dashboard
results.description: E2B Dashboard is a modern, feature-rich web application built with Next.js 15 and React 19 to manage and monitor E2B services, providing a seamless user experience for managing sandboxes, API keys, and usage analytics.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK
results.description: The E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK provides programmatic access to secure, open-source virtual desktops, enabling users to create, launch applications, and stream virtual computer environments for AI agents and other automated tasks.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure providing secure, isolated cloud sandboxes (VMs) for running AI-generated code. It enables AI data analysis, code interpretation, and agent environments.

results.title: PHP SDK for Maib E-commerce API
results.description: A PHP SDK for the Maib ecommerce API, enabling developers to integrate payment processing, including direct payments, two-step payments, refunds, and recurring payments.

results.title: Sketchfab OAuth2
results.description: A JavaScript browser library for connecting to a Sketchfab account using the OAuth2 Implicit flow.

results.title: EPay SDK PHP V2
results.description: A PHP Software Development Kit (SDK) for integrating with an e-payment system, representing the second version of the library.

results.title: Commerce SDK Isomorphic
results.description: Browser & Node.js JavaScript client for B2C Commerce API

results.title: Linq To DB
results.description: Linq to database provider.

results.title: Code Interpreter
results.description: E2B Code Interpreter is an open-source infrastructure that allows you to run AI-generated code in secure, isolated sandboxes in the cloud, with SDKs available for JavaScript and Python.

results.title: AWS SDK for Java v2
results.description: The AWS SDK for Java 2.0 enables developers to easily work with Amazon Web Services, featuring non-blocking IO and pluggable HTTP implementations for customizable applications.

results.title: Circles SDK v2
results.description: A comprehensive TypeScript SDK providing contract interaction, RPC client for data queries, and utility packages for the Circles protocol.

results.title: E2B Infrastructure
results.description: E2B Infrastructure is an open-source platform providing the underlying infrastructure for E2B's AI code interpreting capabilities, supporting self-hosting with Terraform on various cloud providers like GCP and AWS.

results.title: P2.js
results.description: JavaScript 2D physics library

results.title: Espruino Bangle.js 2 Software Reference
results.description: A comprehensive software reference detailing the functionality, APIs, and global objects available for the Bangle.js 2 smartwatch within the Espruino JavaScript microcontroller platform.

results.title: BrainBit SDK2
results.description: BrainBit SDK2 is a multi-platform neurosensor SDK that enables developers to connect to and receive signals from BrainBit and DragonEEG neuro-sensors via BLE technology across Android, iOS, Windows, MacOS, Linux and other platforms.

results.title: libp2p JavaScript
results.description: The JavaScript Implementation of libp2p networking stack.

results.title: Medusa B2B Starter
results.description: A customizable B2B e-commerce solution built with Medusa 2.0 and a Next.js storefront, featuring company management, spending limits, bulk add-to-cart, quote management, order edits, and approval workflows.

results.title: AWS SDK for Go v2
results.description: The AWS SDK for Go v2 provides a comprehensive set of tools and libraries for Go developers to interact with Amazon Web Services, enabling them to build and deploy cloud-native applications.

results.title: E2B MCP
results.description: Run Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers securely within E2B sandboxes for safe execution of untrusted tools and code, offering CLI and Python API for AI agents, SaaS, and developer tools.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox
results.description: E2B Desktop Sandbox is an open-source secure virtual desktop that provides isolated, customizable sandboxes for launching applications and streaming their screens, offering features like password protection.

results.title: EDK2
results.description: EDK2 is an open-source implementation of the Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) specification, providing a comprehensive development environment for firmware.

results.title: ZITADEL NextJS B2B Demo
results.description: A demo showcasing ZITADEL in a B2B context, enabling companies to provide customer portals with features like service discovery, user management, invitations, and advanced search.

results.title: a2a-sdk Python API
results.description: This documentation outlines the Python API for the a2a-sdk, detailing its packages and modules for client authentication and transport.

results.title: A2A Java SDK
results.description: A Java library that helps run agentic applications as A2AServers following the Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol.

results.title: Inference Gateway SDK
results.description: A powerful and easy-to-use Go SDK for the Inference Gateway, enabling connection to multiple LLM providers with features like streaming responses and function calling.

results.title: Business Management
results.description: A next-generation B2B API (V2) for business management, offering improved design, consistent naming, and actively expanding features for new integrations.

results.title: Bitrix24 SDK Examples
results.description: This project provides example code for using the Bitrix24 B24SDK in JavaScript and PHP, demonstrating various functionalities and integrations.
